# Configra — LLM Context

Configra is the canonical Rust configuration substrate for the Phenotype
organization. Key facts:

- Primary: Rust (Cargo workspace, resolver 2)
- Crates: pheno-config (core), config-schema (validation), settly (legacy)
- Features: layered config (env/TOML/CLI), feature flags, secrets (AES-256-GCM),
  audit trail, point-in-time restore, CLI (clap), TUI (ratatui)
- Persistence: SQLite with auto-migration
- Bindings: TypeScript `@phenotype/config-ts` in Conft
- ADRs: ADR-022 (Rust/TS split), ADR-031 (canonical name), ADR-035 (migration)
- Status: ACTIVE, pre-1.0

Quick start:
```bash
cargo build --workspace
cargo test --workspace
phenoctl config set app.name "My App"
```

Related: Conft (../Conft) — TS edge layer
